proof: function[T0: OrderedField](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0], x2: Point2[T0]) { x0.on_line(x1, x2) = x0.collinear(x1, x2) }[T](a, b, p)
function[T0: OrderedField](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0], x2: Point2[T0]) { x0.on_line(x1, x2) = x0.collinear(x1, x2) }[T](a, b, p)

function[T0: OrderedField](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0], x2: Point2[T0], x3: Point2[T0]) { (x0.left_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.left_of_line(x1, x3) or (x0.right_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.right_of_line(x1, x3))) = x0.same_strict_side(x1, x2, x3) }[T](a, b, p, q)

function[T0: OrderedField](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0], x2: Point2[T0], x3: Point2[T0]) { (x0.left_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.left_of_line(x1, x3) or (x0.right_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.right_of_line(x1, x3))) = x0.same_strict_side(x1, x2, x3) }[T](a.translate(v), b.translate(v), p.translate(v), q.translate(v))

function[T0: OrderedField](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0], x2: Point2[T0], x3: Point2[T0]) { (x0.left_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.right_of_line(x1, x3) or (x0.right_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.left_of_line(x1, x3))) = x0.opposite_strict_sides(x1, x2, x3) }[T](a, b, p, q)

function[T0: OrderedField](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0], x2: Point2[T0], x3: Point2[T0]) { (x0.left_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.right_of_line(x1, x3) or (x0.right_of_line(x1, x2) and x0.left_of_line(x1, x3))) = x0.opposite_strict_sides(x1, x2, x3) }[T](a.translate(v), b.translate(v), p.translate(v), q.translate(v))
